login.title: Banye
login.subtitle: Jikwaa ihe niile dị na ụlọ gị n'ụzọ amamihe
login.username_or_email: Aha njirimara ma ọ bụ Email
login.terms_title: 📋 Okwu ndị eji eme ihe na nkwupụta nkwụsị okwu
login.terms_beta: Version BETA: HomeInventory nọ ugbu a n’ọkwa ule. Enweghị nkwa ndị dị gbasara ịdịgide ma ọ bụ nchedo data gị.
login.terms_disclaimer: Nkwupụta nkwụsị okwu: Site n’iji ngwa a, ị kwenyere na ị gaghị ekwu maka nkwụ ụgwọ ọ bụla maka ọnwụ data nwere ike ime, nsogbu nbanye, ma ọ bụ mmejọ teknụzụ ndị ọzọ.
login.terms_backup: Nchekwa Data: Anyị na-adụ ọdụ ka ị na-echekwa ozi dị mkpa gị ugboro ugboro.
login.terms_accept: Site n’ịbanye, a na-ewere na ị nabatala okwu ndị a.

register.title: Nnọọ na HomeInventory
register.subtitle: Mepụta akaụntụ ọhụrụ ma ọ bụ sonyere n'ụlọ dị adị
register.create_house_desc: 🏠 Ụlọ ọhụrụ ga-emere ma ị ga-enweta Igodo Ụlọ pụrụ iche. Kesaa igodo a na ezinụlọ ka ha nwee ike iru otu nkwakọ ngwaahịa ahụ.
register.join_house_desc: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Tinye Igodo Ụlọ e kesara gị ka ị sonye n'ụlọ dị adị. Onye ọ bụla nwere igodo ahụ nwere ike iru nkwakọ ngwaahịa a kesara.
register.key_required: Igodo Ụlọ dị mkpa iji sonye na ụlọ dị adị

key_created.title: 🎉 E kere Ụlọ!
key_created.subtitle: Chekwaa igodo dị n'okpuru ebe a n'ebe dị nchebe
key_created.warning: Dị Mkpa: Igodo a ga-egosipụta otu ugboro naanị. Kekọrịta ya na ndị otu ezinụlọ ka ha nwee ike inweta ihe ndị dị na ụlọ niile.
key_created.button: E chekwara m igodo, Gaa n'ihu

email_verification.title: 📧 A choro Nkọwa Email
email_verification.message: E mepụtara akaụntụ! Biko nyochaa adreesị email gị iji banye.
email_verification.step_2: Pịa bọtịnụ <1>"Nyochaa Akaụntụ M"</1> dị na email.
email_verification.step_3: Mgbe nyocha gasịrị, <1>ị nwere ike ịbanye</1>.
email_verification.spam_note: Lelee nchekwa spam/junk ma ọ bụrụ na email ahụ anaghị abịa.
email_verification.key_note: Dị Mkpa: A zitere igodo ụlọ gị na email ahụ kwa. Ị nwere ike kesaa ya na ndị òtù ezinụlọ.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Start a secure recovery flow to access your account again.
forgot_password.email_success: If an account exists, a password reset link valid for 15 minutes has been sent.
forgot_password.recovery_mode_info: Email is disabled on this server. Continue with the Recovery Key you saved during account setup.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.subtitle: Use the secure link to set a new password.
reset_password.missing_token: The password reset link looks incomplete or broken.

recovery_setup.title: Create Recovery Key
recovery_setup.subtitle: Until this is completed, your account is not considered safe for local password recovery.
recovery_setup.warning: This key will only be shown once. Save it in a password manager or another secure offline location.
recovery_setup.account: A recovery key will be created for account {{username}}.
recovery_setup.description: Because email is disabled, you will only be able to reset your password with this key in the future.

recovery_key_modal.subtitle: This key is shown only once.
recovery_key_modal.warning: If you lose this key while email is disabled, you may not be able to recover your password. Copy it and store it safely.

filters.no_items: Enweghị ihe ọ bụla kwekọrọ na nzacha a

beta_banner.title: BETA:
beta_banner.text: HomeInventory nọ ugbu a na ule na oge ntụrụndụ. Enweghị nkwa enyere maka nchekwa ma ọ bụ nchebe data. Biko debe ndabere nke ozi dị mkpa.

my_houses.title: Ụlọ m
my_houses.no_house: Ị bụghị ezigbo onye òtù nke ụlọ ọ bụla ruo ugbu a
my_houses.info: 💡 Ị nwere ike ịbụ onye otu ụlọ dị iche iche ma gbanwee n'etiti ha. Ụlọ ọ bụla na-edobe ihe dị iche iche n'otu n'ọdụ.

house_info.title: Igodo Ụlọ Na-arụ Ọrụ
house_info.share_info: 💡 Ndị ọrụ ị nwere ịkekọrịta igodo a na ha nwere ike ịnweta ihe ndị dị na nchekwa gị site n'iji nhọrọ "Jikọọ Ụlọ" mgbe ndebanye aha.
house_info.no_members: Enweghị ndị otu ndị ọzọ ọ bụla ugbu a
house_info.invite_desc: Kekọrịta igodo ụlọ gị ka ndị ezinaụlọ nwee ike ịnweta ihe ndị ahụ n'otu nchekwa. Onye ọ bụla na-abanye site na akaụntụ nke ya mana ọ na-enweta data ahụ dị ka otu.

email.title: Zipu Ozi Email
email.subject: Isiokwu
email.error: Iziga enweghị ihe ịga nke ọma

hero.description: Mee ka ndekọ ihe ụlọ gị bụrụ dijitalụ. Kekọrịta ihe, kpọọ ndị ezinụlọ, ma nweta site n'ebe ọ bụla. Nke oge a, dị nchebe, ma dị mfe iji.

features.title: Gịnị kpatara <1>HomeInventory</1>?
features.subtitle: Ọrụ niile iji mee ka nchịkwa ụlọ dị mfe n'otu ikpo okwu

categorize.title: Kekọrịta Ihe
categorize.desc: Hazie ihe niile site n'ụlọ na otu, chọta ihe ịchọrọ n'ime sekọnd ole na ole.

family.title: Kpọọ Ezinụlọ na Igodo Ụlọ
family.desc: Kpọrọ ndị ezinụlọ gị na igodo ụlọ gị pụrụ iche, jikwaa ngwongwo ọnụ.

access.title: Ịnweta Site Ebe Ọ bụla
access.desc: N'ụlọ, n'ọrụ, ma ọ bụ n'ezumike - nweta ngwongwo gị n'ụzọ nchekwa site n'ebe ọ bụla.

barcode.title: Tinye Ngwa ngwa na Barcode
barcode.desc: Ịkpọ ọkpụkpọ ngwaahịa barọgụ, nkọwa ga-ejikwaghị mechaa.

security.title: Nchedo na Nzuzo
security.desc: Data gị echedoro ma chekwara ya na ntọala nkwa KVKK.

backup.title: Nchekwa & Mbupụ
backup.desc: Chekwaa ngwongwo gị na JSON format, weghachite mgbe ọ bụla ịchọrọ.

cta_bottom.title: Malite Iji Ugbu a!
cta_bottom.description: Wepụta akaụntụ efu ma dijitalụ ngwongwo ụlọ gị. Debanye aha na-ewe naanị sekọnd ole na ole.

footer.desc: Nyere na nchekwa mfe iji dijitalụ ngwongwo ụlọ gị.

landing.preview_privacy_notice: Nlele ngosi: enwereghị data onye ọrụ n’eziokwu egosipụtara.

inventory.title: Nchekwa
inventory.content: N'ebe a, ị nwere ike itinye ma depụta ihe gị. Soro ihe niile dị n'ụlọ na otu ebe!

house_key.title: Igodo Ụlọ
house_key.content: Nke a bụ igodo ụlọ gị, jiri ya mee ka ndị ọzọ bịanye. Tinye ndị òtù ezinụlọ na ụlọ gị!

categories.title: Ụdị
categories.content: Hazie site n'ịkọwa ihe gị. Ngwa eletrọnik, ngwongwo ụlọ, nke kichin, na ihe ndị ọzọ!

google_house_select.title: Nnọọ!
google_house_select.subtitle: Ịbanye na Google. Ugbu a họrọ ụlọ.
google_house_select.house_name_hint: Ọ bụrụ na ahapụla ya, a ga-akpọ ya "Ụlọ M"
google_house_select.house_key_hint: Tinye igodo ndị nwere mkpụrụedemede 64 enyere site n'aka onye òtù ezinụlọ

scanner.permission_error: E jighị ikike igwefoto. Lelee ntọala nchọgharị.
scanner.busy_error: Igwefoto na-arụ ọrụ. Mechie ngwa ndị ọzọ.
scanner.found_local_msg: Barcode a dịla na ngwa ahịa gị.
scanner.not_found_db: E nweghị barcode a n'ime ndekọ.
scanner.quick_add: Tinye ngwa ngwa (dezie ma e mesịa)

scanner.found_page_redirect: E nwere ibe! A na-ebuga gị ...

item_qr.hint_mobile: 📱 Nyochaa QR koodu a na ekwentị gị iji nweta ihe ahụ ngwa ngwa
item_qr.usage_desc: Bipụta QR koodu ma tee ya na ihe ahụ. Nyochaa ya na ekwentị gị iji nweta ibe a ozugbo!

pending.title: Waiting for house owner approval
pending.description: Your request for "{{house}}" is still waiting for a decision.

no_house.title: You are not connected to a house right now
no_house.description: Create a new house or send a join request to an existing one.

create.title: Create a New House
create.description: Start your own home inventory and continue right away.
create.name_placeholder: e.g. My Home, Summer House, Storage

join.title: Send a Join Request
join.description: Enter a house key and send the request directly to the house owner.
